1.description: Time series of financial misconduct rate. This figure plots the time-series pattern of the city-level financial misconduct (FM) rate for three groups of cities sorted by their time-series average FM rate over the full sample. The top and bottom quartiles are reported separately, while the middle two quartiles are combined. Panel A depicts the raw FM rate, while Panel B depicts the industry-adjusted FM rate, where the average industry FM rate (outside of our 20-city sample) is subtracted from the raw FM rate.

2.description: White collar misbehaviors and financial misconduct. This figure provides a scatterplot of financial misconduct rates and the average city rankings of five types of white collar misbehavior. The numbers used to generate this scatterplot are reported in TableI. The straight line depicts the best-fit line. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
